results.justification: TRIM omits a predefined set of semantic-irrelevant easily-inferable words during inference + smaller LM reconstructs — DIRECT TWIN of TIFINAGH-SPARSE-TOK's omit-then-fill paradigm.
Prunes less-critical prompt tokens dynamically; same artefact.
Token pruning before FFN based on attention scores.
Prompt compression techniques covering omission paradigm.
DIRECT TWIN — stopword removal alone reduces costs 30% while maintaining 95.9% quality. Stopwords are functional analog of vowels in TIFINAGH.
Token compression including LLMLingua; covers compression-and-fill.

results.matched_effect_cluster: Training LLMs over neurally compressed text

Tokenizer-level optimization for pretraining + adaptation; adjacent.
